[Congressional Bills 107th Congress]
[From the U.S. Government Publishing Office]
[H. Res. 282 Engrossed in House (EH)]


                 In the House of Representatives, U.S.,

                                                      November 8, 2001.
    Resolved, That Mr. Lynch of Massachusetts shall rank after Mr. Shows of 
Mississippi on the Committee on Veterans' Affairs.
            Attest:

                                                                          Clerk.
